title: fix(deps): update github.com/hugelgupf/p9 digest to 6f4f11e
body:

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
Cockpit tests failed for commit 2770d6df9fd82a88d38754bf1553acf9a9eb45af. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.
@martinpitt Looks like the pasta error message is still failing in the cockpit validation test for some reason?

This was fixed by https://github.com/cockpit-project/cockpit-podman/commit/4ff03e11c6364b68a45d66c7d5dffc843a699e83 and a local run with the podman-next COPR works fine. I am even able to provoke the "No routable interface for IPv6: IPv6 is disabled" bit by running `ip -6 route del default` in our test machine. And that commit landed on Feb 29 while [the failed run here](https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/fe8070a0-2ec6-47ae-9a14-ab0d04ddde09/) ran yesterday on March 1 :confused: 

But the logs here show this installed version:

> cockpit-podman-84.1-1.20240229081902060194.main.19.g232ea86.fc40.noarch

and that commit is *before* the above "Adjust for new podman pasta version" one. So this should work now, and just needs a retry. Sorry for the noise!

@martinpitt Thanks
FYI, the `"No routable interface for IPv6: IPv6 is disabled` should go away in the next pasta release (https://passt.top/passt/commit/?id=15001b39ef1d41c0535ef0d2384e074c6f85cefd)
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
